concepts_used.title: 线性回归与最小二乘
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用最小二乘回归分析预测手机用户和电动汽车数量的增长趋势，分别得到线性增长率和二次增长率。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We adopt Least Squares regression analysis to determine the number and increasing rate in the following two years.

concepts_used.title: 非线性与指数模型拟合
concepts_used.how_used: 论文对电动汽车数量采用二次回归模型，预测2020年增长率为23.38%。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: the increasing rate of electric vehicles is quadratic and will be 23.38% in 2020.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 论文通过改变敏感系数（如设备与充电口比例）观察成本变化，进行灵敏度分析。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: By plugging different values into the sensitive coefficients in our formulas (such as the ratio between electric devices and charging equipment), and observe how the costs will change accordingly.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文明确列出三条假设，包括数据时间范围、理想比例和电子设备类型，并给出理由。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumption1:We only analyze energy consumption data after 2010. ... Assumption2:We assume the ideal ratio of electric vehicles to charging outlets is 10:1. ... Assumption3:The electronic devices that use electric charging connections are mobile phones and laptops.

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：引言、假设、模型设计、应用、灵敏度分析、结论等，符合学术规范。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Table of Contents: 1 Introduction, 2 Assumptions, 3 Definitions and Notations, 4 Model Design, 5 Model Applications, 6 Initiatives, 7 Model Strengths and Weaknesses, 8 Conclusion

concepts_used.title: 图表标题与编号规范
concepts_used.how_used: 论文中图表均有编号和标题，如Figure 1和Figure 2，并引用在正文中。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Figure 1: Public free charging site ... Figure 2: The Construction of Our Model

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用流程图展示模型构建步骤，并可能使用其他图表展示数据趋势。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Figure 2: The Construction of Our Model

concepts_used.title: MATLAB 编程基础
concepts_used.how_used: 论文在附录中提供Matlab代码实现模型计算。
